---
title: Metadata Theme with Custom SCSS (Same Dir)
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["#170229", "metadata-scss-marker", "#d4e5f6"]
---

## Same-Directory Metadata Theme

This document is in `chapters/` alongside `_metadata.yml` which sets
`theme: [vapor, custom-chapters.scss]`. Both vapor and the custom SCSS
should be present in the output CSS.
